Title: The Orbital Eccentricities of Planets in the Kinematic 
       Thin and Thick Galactic Disks

Table: Planet host sample and kinematic disk associations

Byte-by-byte Description of file: ajae71bft1_mrt.txt
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   Bytes Format Units  Label     Explanations
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   1-  8 I8     ---    KIC       Kepler Input catalog identifier
  10- 28 I19    ---    Source    Gaia DR3 source identifier
  30- 37 F8.4   deg    RAdeg     Right ascension in decimal degrees (J2000)
  39- 45 F7.4   deg    DEdeg     Declination in decimal degrees (J2000)
  47- 53 F7.4   mas    plx       Parallax
  55- 60 F6.4   kpc    Zgalcen   Galactocentric vertical coordinate
  62- 67 F6.4   kpc    Rgalcen   Cylindrical Galactocentric radial coordinate
  69- 74 F6.4   rad    phigalcen Cylindrical Galactocentric azimuthal coordinate
  76- 84 F9.4   km/s   VRinfer   Inferred radial velocity
  86- 94 F9.4   km/s   Vphiinfer Inferred azimuthal velocity
  96-100 F5.1   km/s   VZinfer   Inferred vertical velocity
 102-110 F9.4   km/s   VRcalc    True radial velocity (1)
 112-120 F9.4   km/s   Vphicalc  True azimuthal velocity (1)
 122-128 F7.2   km/s   VZcalc    True vertical velocity (1)
 130-135 F6.4   ---    Pthick    Kinematic thick disk probability based on GMM analysis
 137-141 A5     ---    DiskAssn  Kinematic thin vs. thick disk association
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Note (1): Entries of zero indicate that a true velocity measurement is not 
          available, and inferred velocities are used.
